Related Tools

📈 Live Tracker

24+ countries, 7 karats, updated every 90 seconds. Set price alerts and export data.

🧮 Gold Calculator

Calculate gold value, scrap price, Zakat, and buying power — all in one tool.

🏪 Find a Shop

Browse listed gold shops by region, country, city, and specialty across GCC and beyond.
